description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest Docker image with a docker:dind service. Define two stages named build and build_front. In the build stage add a job called build that runs on the gitlab/dind image and executes the commands: export IMAGE_TAG=$(echo -en $CI_BUILD_REF_NAME | tr -c '[:alnum:]_.-' '-'), docker login -u "$CI_BUILD_USER" -p "$CI_BUILD_TOKEN" $CI_REGISTRY, docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_TAG" ., and docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_TAG". In the build_front stage add a job called build_front that runs on the node:latest image and runs npm install followed by npm run prod. The pipeline does not define any caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
